title: Toka
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Toka}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Toka-SandBlasted.png]] |name=Toka |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}}According to ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'', the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[attack on Tak Base]] takes place after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]—the final event before the start of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''—but before [[Kyle Katarn]] [[Mission to Orinackra|rescues]] [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] from [[Orinackra]]. According to {{FactFile|130|MAD 1-4|General Crix Madine}}, Madine's escape from Orinackra takes place approximately a little more than a [[Standard week/Legends|week]] after [[Gender/Legends|his]] desertion from [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial service]], which the "[[Galaxywide NewsNets]]" feature from [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 5|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 5]] dates to [[Great ReSynchronization|36:2:12]], or 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]. Therefore, the Imperial attack on [[Tak Base]] must take place in 0 ABY. [[Tak Base]] |species=[[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |skin=Orange |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|This is Tak Base to anybody out there…''Please''…We're under Imperial attack…They're everywhere, there was no warning at all…''Total devastation''! They broke through our ''shields''…They broke through our ''shields''!|Admiral Toka, in a distress signal moments before his death|audio=TalayBaseUnderAttack-DF.flac|''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''}} '''Toka''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] who held the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Admiral Toka was in [[Tak Base]] when it was [[Attack on Tak Base|attacked]] by [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] and was subsequently [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the assault. ==Biography== {{Quote|I'll send a distress signal, but I fear all is lost. ''Go''! And may the Force be with you!|Admiral Toka, to Captain Bok|}} [[File:TokaDies-SandBlasted.png|thumb|left|180px|Admiral Toka is killed during the attack on Tak Base.]] Toka was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], Toka was stationed at [[Tak Base]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] installation on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Talay/Legends|Talay]], when Imperial [[General/Legends|General]] [[Rom Mohc]] tested [[Gender/Legends|his]] new [[Dark Trooper Project]] by launching [[Dark Trooper/Legends|dark troopers]] in a devastating assault against the base. As the Imperial attack rained down, Toka ordered Rebel [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bok (Mon Calamari)|Bok]] to flee Talay aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] ''[[Grey Damsel]]'' using escape coordinates provided to them by the Alliance. Soon thereafter, Toka sent out a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] to anyone who might receive it but was immediately [[Death/Legends|killed]] by [[Blaster/Legends|blasterfire]]. Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after Toka's death, Alliance [[Chief of State (Alliance)/Legends|leader]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] showed the admiral's distress signal to [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Kyle Katarn]] in preparation for his follow-up investigatory [[mission to Talay]]. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Escape while you still ''can'', my friend! Warn our allies of this ''new'' threat!''"
"''But we can't ''abandon'' you here, Admiral Toka!''"
"''Launch now or perish! Use the escape coordinates the Alliance gave us. ''Flee''!|Admiral Toka and Captain Bok|}} During the Imperial massacre of the Rebellion's Tak Base, Admiral Toka demonstrated his selflessness by ordering his friend and fellow [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] Captain Bok to escape Talay and warn the Alliance of the Empire's new threat rather than risk trying to rescue Toka. The admiral volunteered to stay behind and transmit a distress signal, even though doing so meant abandoning himself to his fate. As a Mon Calamari, Toka had [[Color/Legends|orange]] skin and yellow [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. ==Equipment== Admiral Toka wore the [[Mon Cal uniform jerkin]]''[[Star Wars: The Complete Visual Dictionary]]'' during his service at Tak Base. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Toka-DarkForces.png|thumb|right|250px|''Star Wars: Dark Forces'' used ''Return of the Jedi'' film footage of Admiral Ackbar to depict Toka in holographic form.]] Admiral Toka first appeared in the [[1995]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'', in which he was voiced by [[Denny Delk]] and identified in the credits only as "Dying Rebel." ''Dark Forces'' used footage of Admiral [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] from the film [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] to depict Toka's [[Hologram/Legends|holographic]] form. Toka was later identified by name in the [[2000]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic story]] "[[Sand Blasted]]," written by [[Kilian Plunkett]] and published in [[Star Wars Tales 4|''Star Wars Tales'' 4]], which expanded upon the Talay massacre from ''Dark Forces''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' {{1st}} {{Hologram}} *''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]'' {{Hologram}} *{{Tales|4|Sand Blasted}} {{1stID|Toka}} ==Sources== *''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]'' *{{NightdiveYouTube|4b9TTurkH4c|Star Wars™: Dark Forces Remaster - Reveal Trailer}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Toka}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Toka |es=Toka |pl=Toka |uk=Тока }} [[Category:Alliance Fleet admirals]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mon Calamari]]
